synopsis: Fate of the Jedi: Abyss is the third novel in the nine-book Fate of the Jedi series set two years after Star Wars: Legacy of the Force by Troy Denning and was released on August 18, 2009. At the end of the book, it has an introduction to Backlash. The audio version is narrated by Marc Thompson. The paperback was released on June 22, 2010.
title: Abyss
